org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class MessageTransportService

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.MessageTransportService
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    NetworkMessageTransportService
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class MessageTransportService
extends Object
    This component permits to route the message between agents.

    The implementation of this MTS assumes that only one kernel is available. It does not support more than one kernel and network communication.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Method Detail

      • stopMTS

        public void stopMTS()
        Deprecated. 
        Invoked by the kernel when the MTS should stop.

      • startMTS

        public void startMTS()
        Deprecated. 
        Invoked by the kernel when the MTS should start.

      • registerAgent

        void registerAgent(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Create a local message box for the specified agent.

      • unregisterAgent

        void unregisterAgent(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Delete the local message box of the specified agent.

      • send

        public boolean send(Message m)
        Deprecated. 
        Send the specified message according to the knownledge of this MTS.

      • registerInLocalBoxes

        protected boolean registerInLocalBoxes(Message m)
        Deprecated. 
        Store the specified message inside the local message boxes.
        Returns:
        true if the message was successfully stored, otherwise false

      • getNextMessage

        public Message getNextMessage(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the next available message for the specified agent.

        This method consumes the message. It means that the message will never be obtain another time.

        Parameters:
        id - is the identifier of the agent for which the message was extracted.
        Returns:
        a message or null if none available

      • hasMessage

        protected boolean hasMessage(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if a message is available for the specified agent.

        This method does not consume the message.

        Parameters:
        id - is the identifier of the agent for which the message was extracted.
        Returns:
        true if a message is available, otherwise false

      • getKernelId

        protected KernelIdentifier getKernelId()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the identifier of a kernel.

        This method is invoked by the kernel to obtain its own identifier.
